case_title: DUK SOON LEE VS. BOXUN XUN HUANG et al

docket_entries.description: CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO BOXUN XUN HUANG BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF JUL-13-2010 AT 10:00AM.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEE, DUK SOON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HUANG, ZHUNG CHI $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $650.00, DEFENDANT BOXUN XUN HUAND IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUN-08-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HUANG, BOXUN XUN
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUN-08-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT HUANG, ZHUNG CHI
ADDED TO EXHIBIT DESTRUCTION REPORT OF JUN-02-2014
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUN-02-2014 ORDERED DESTROYED
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $500.00 FILED BY LEE, DUK SOON AS TO DEFENDANT HUANG, BOXUN XUN HUANG, ZHUNG CHI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-13-2010 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-13-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-13-2010 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: ELIZABETH RILES. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-13-2010 - JUDGMENT.
